aliasEditor.helpText: Variant names for an entity such as alternate spelling, different script, stylistic representation, acronyms, etc. Refer to the help page for more details and examples.
aliasEditor.title: Alias Editor
disambiguationField.label: Disambiguation
disambiguationField.tooltip: If a different entity with the same name already exists or if there is a need for clarification
languageField.label: Language
nameField.label: Name
nameSection.clickToOpen: Click on a name to open it (Ctrl/Cmd + click to open in a new tab)
nameSection.ctrlClick: Ctrl/Cmd + click to open in a new tab
nameSection.duplicateSuggestion: If the {{entityType}} you want to add appears in the results below, click on it to inspect it before adding a possible duplicate.
nameSection.duplicateWarning_one: We found the following {{entityType}} with exactly the same name or alias:
nameSection.duplicateWarning_other: We found the following {{entityType}}s with exactly the same name or alias:
nameSection.fillDisambiguation: If you are sure your entry is different, please fill the disambiguation field below to help us differentiate between them.
nameSection.heading: What is the {{entityType}} called?
nameSection.languageTooltip: Language used for the above name
nameSection.nameTooltip: Official name of the {{entityType}} in its original language. Names in other languages should be added as aliases.
sortNameField.label: Sort Name
sortNameField.tooltip: Alphabetical sorting name. Examples: 'Dickens, Charles', 'Christmas Carol, A'. You can try to fill it automatically with the guess button
